response:
Alex enjoys books.
Books bring joy.
Joy fills hearts.
Hearts hold love.
Love changes minds.
Minds shift views.
Views grow wide.
Wide paths lead.
Lead to truth.
Truth shines bright.
Bright days pass.
Pass time fast.
Fast reading helps.
Helps learn much.
Much time spent.
Spent on pages.
Pages hold stories.
Stories teach well.
Well read souls.
Souls seek change.
Change comes slow.
Slow growth matters.
Matters for all.
All read now.
Now three books.
Books took days.
Days were long.
Long weeks passed.
Passed with care.
Careful thought used.
Used to find.
Find new ways.
Ways to love.
